issues.title: S/MIME 4+ Requested Changes
issues.author: seanturner
issues.body:
A list of changes (will use sub-issues to track):

# Technical Changes to Incorporate
- [ ] Address Falco attack; see #2
    - [ ] Require signed attributes.
    - [ ] Also, adopt id-ct-mimeData content type from [-cms-euf-cma-signeddata](https://github.com/lamps-wg/cms-euf-cma-signeddata)?

# Changes to Consider Incorporating
- [ ] Deprecate EnvelopedData (and AES-CBC)?
- [ ] Deprecate RSA encryption?
- [ ] Keep RSA-OAEP?
- [ ] Add PQ support?

# Editorial
- [ ] Change Title and Abbreviation to be "4+" until we decide on #
- [ ] Review and update references, e.g., latest ASN.1, FIPS, ...
- [ ] Incorporate # number throughout

issues.title: Address Falco Attack
issues.author: seanturner
issues.body:
There are two ways to address the FALCO attack. Which way do we want to go:

1. Simply always require some signed attributes.
2. Also, adopt id-ct-mimeData content type from [-cms-euf-cma-signeddata](https://github.com/lamps-wg/cms-euf-cma-signeddata).
